MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the inoperative stabilizer control channel (AMM DDG 27-41-03).

ListItem.Para: For L2 stabilizer control channel inoperative, deactivate L2 channel:
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker ELECT STAB-L and lock with an INOP tag.
Gain access to the horizontal stabilizer trim actuator (HSTA).
Disconnect, cap, and stow the 235 VAC electrical connector for the L2 electronic motor control unit (EMCU).
If the L2 STAB BRK RELEASE indication on FLIGHT CONTROL maintenance page 3 is NO, removal of the associated motor / brake assembly is not required.
If the L2 STAB BRK RELEASE indication on FLIGHT CONTROL maintenance page 3 is YES, remove the associated motor / brake assembly and install dispatch tool K27048.

Note.Para: If the L2 STAB BRK RELEASE indication on FLIGHT CONTROL maintenance page 3 is blank, existing Flight Controls electronics faults must be resolved until either a YES or NO is displayed.

ListItem.Para: For R2 stabilizer control channel inoperative, deactivate R2 channel:
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker ELECT STAB-R and lock with an INOP tag.
Gain access to the horizontal stabilizer trim actuator (HSTA).
Disconnect, cap, and stow the 235 VAC electrical connector for the R2 electronic motor control unit (EMCU).
If the R2 STAB BRK RELEASE indication on FLIGHT CONTROL maintenance page 3 is NO, removal of the associated motor / brake assembly is not required.
If the R2 STAB BRK RELEASE indication on FLIGHT CONTROL maintenance page 3 is YES, remove the associated motor / brake assembly and install dispatch tool K27048.

Note.Para: If the R2 STAB BRK RELEASE indication on FLIGHT CONTROL maintenance page 3 is blank, existing Flight Controls electronics faults must be resolved until either a YES or NO is displayed.

ListItem.Para: Confirm the STABILIZER SYS status message is not displayed.
Verify remaining stabilizer channel operates normally.
From either control wheel trim switch, trim in either direction and confirm stabilizer movement on the EICAS stabilizer position indication. Stabilizer will move at half the normal rate.
The STABILIZER L2 or STABILIZER R2 advisory message will be displayed
Stabilizer will move at half the normal rate.
